length_prefix.value: length of our packet body in bytes
length_prefix.note: tells the server how many bytes follow

packet_id.note: identifies this as a handshake packet

hostnames_length.note: number of bytes the hostname occupies, not character count

state.note: 1 is status, 2 is login, 3 is transfer

length_prefix.type: varint (fuck you again again again again)

packet_id.type: varint (fuck you again again again again again)
packet_id.note: tells server to send th status response
